  "claims": [
    "California passed a Cap and Trade extension to combat climate change.",
    "Sustainable waste management strategies can help fight global warming.",
    "Reducing waste and diverting organic material from landfills can lower greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "Legislation mandates local governments to divert 50% of organic waste from landfills by 2020 and 75% by 2025.",
    "Existing laws require local governments to reduce waste at the source and increase recycling efforts."
